title: Bubble UI Sound
description: This resource pack replaces the regular Minecraft click sound with a bubble gurgle.
body:
This pack replaces the standard UI click with a bubble gurgle.
It perfectly complements the [ReGlass](https://modrinth.com/mod/reglass) mod’s glass-themed interface redesign, making every menu interaction feel fluid and immersive.
That's all.
